final_prompt.prompt:
Create a social media cover image for a 小红书 post announcing GPT-image-2 launch on Lovart.

Style/medium: needs a "高级杂志感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Kinfolk editorial photography, 1990s The Face magazine covers, Cereal magazine minimalist layout tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be diagonal composition
Subject: must include the announcement of GPT-image-2 launch on Lovart platform as focal content
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: must be high-contrast accent colors dominant
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: must follow diagonal composition rule
Avoid:
